name: Media Pipeline
description: Automated video transcoding pipeline — NAS folder watcher, Bun REST API with SQLite job queue, SSH Mac worker + DigitalOcean cloud fallback, n8n orchestration, and Discord notifications.
highlights: Multi-target worker dispatch: local Mac via SSH with automatic DO droplet fallback
Deduplicated file watching with MD5 hash tracking and structured job retry logic
n8n workflow orchestrator gluing watcher, worker pool API, and Discord notifications
